title: GTCX meta-workspace members
description: Member repos for the GTCX meta-workspace (local cross-repo co-development). The root pnpm-workspace.yaml is GENERATED at the gtcx-ecosystem workspace parent by platform/scripts/meta-workspace/setup.mjs — never hand-edited. Each member may specify a vertical-qualified `path` after the 2026-07-05 reorg.

members.note: Globs reconciled to real tree; protocols subtree builds + tests green (vaultmark 470/470).
Installs clean on its own (own workspace, 0 dead globs). Resolves gtcx-os platforms' cross-repo @gtcx/ui dep by membership.
AI platform runtime (7-layer pipeline, router, vault). Canonical home: gtcx.ai/platforms/baseline-os (moved 2026-07-07).
Promoted 2026-07-05 after baseline-os decouple via file:tgz artifacts + vertical paths.

notes.nestedWorkspaces: Each member keeps its own pnpm-workspace.yaml for STANDALONE use. Run pnpm from a repo for standalone mode; run from the gtcx-ecosystem parent for META mode.
notes.verticalPaths: After reorg, `path` is vertical-qualified relative to gtcx-ecosystem root. Legacy flat sibling names (baseline-os/) are not used.
notes.publish: For CI/release, shared packages are published; the meta-workspace is for local co-development.
notes.rollout: Add a repo as 'candidate', verify standalone install, then promote to 'verified'.
